appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais va donc avec lui… reste un peu dans sa chambre… Dis donc à Françoise de te préparer le grand lit… »; « parce qu'il n'avait pas de principes… il n'avait pas… d'intransigeance. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator’s father, out of pragmatic compassion, decides in favor of the child and has the mother sleep beside him, which the narrator frames as a benevolent force opposed to the rigidity of 'principes'.

status_effects.explanation: His decisive and compassionate gesture is valued by the narrator, who contrasts his flexibility with the intransigence of principle.
